visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The camera is positioned at a medium full shot of a white sedan parked on an asphalt street next to a sidewalk with gray stones. In the background, vibrant green trees and a modern glass building are visible under bright, natural daylight. A hand briefly enters from the bottom of the frame, pointing toward the car door with a finger extended. (2) The camera zooms in to a close-up shot of the white car's door handle and the vertical gap between the front and rear doors. A small, bright blue rectangular foam block, divided into four segments, is adhered to the edge of the front door. A finger reaches out and gently presses against the blue foam block, demonstrating its soft texture. (3) The camera pans slightly and moves back to a medium shot, framing the entire side of the white car to show the placement of the blue foam block relative to the vehicle's body. The hand continues to gesture towards the block, emphasizing its contrast against the sleek white paint. The background remains an outdoor urban setting with other cars parked nearby.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator's hand is visible interacting with the car.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is only partially visible through their hand and arm; they appear to be wearing a dark long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban parking area or roadside with other modern vehicles like a silver SUV and a white sedan in the distance. The area is lined with lush green trees and high-rise office buildings under a clear sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in a casual, conversational tone with moderate pitch and clear articulation, narrating his observation about car door sponges. The background audio features a subtle, low-frequency ambient hum typical of an outdoor urban environment, including distant traffic and light wind. (2) A soft percussive thud occurs as a finger taps or touches the blue foam block on the car door. The speaker's voice remains at a steady, natural pace with friendly inflections. The environmental noise floor remains consistent, suggesting an open-air parking lot or quiet street. (3) A series of faint, irregular rustling sounds occur, likely due to microphone handling as the camera moves. The speaker continues his narration without significant pauses, explaining the cultural preference for car protection in South Korea. The recording clarity is high, focusing primarily on the voice.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle vlog documenting a specific cultural observation in South Korea. The creator identifies a common practice where car owners attach foam sponges to their doors to prevent collision damage, even if it looks slightly out of place. The intent is to share a quirky and practical finding with the audience through first-hand demonstration.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video provides a simple, direct observation of a local car-care habit in South Korea, characterized by natural lighting and clear narration.
